_comment: DUMMY DATA — Sample SCA status change alert (failed->passed). All hostnames fictional.

rule.description: SCA check changed status: Ensure IP forwarding is disabled

check.title: Ensure IP forwarding is disabled
check.description: The net.ipv4.ip_forward flag is used to tell the system whether it can forward packets or not.
check.rationale: Setting the flag to 0 ensures that a system with multiple interfaces cannot forward packets between them. This prevents the host from being used as a router.
check.remediation: Set net.ipv4.ip_forward = 0 in /etc/sysctl.d/99-wazuh-hardening.conf and run sysctl --system
